description: Business accounts of a wealthy merchant, probably. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions Ibn Naḥum, the large sum of 662 dinars, Ibn al-Iskandarānī, and something Tripolitan (Iṭrābulsiyya). Also the word Rashīd, potentially referring to the city.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
